action_lock.CP_even: extremize ReTr(A U B U^dagger) for nondegenerate Hermitian A,B
action_lock.CP_odd: extremize signed ImTr([A,U B U^dagger]^3), equivalent up to spectral discriminants to signed J_CP
action_lock.coefficients: one invariant at a time; no tunable ratio

analytic.CP_even_extrema: von Neumann trace inequality: permutation matrices
analytic.CP_odd_extrema: |J_CP| <= 1/(6 sqrt(3)); equality at complex Hadamard matrices

verdict.single_CP_even_selector: predicts permutation/trivial mixing, not observed PMNS
verdict.single_CP_odd_selector: predicts maximally CP-violating complex-Hadamard mixing, not observed PMNS
verdict.minimal_requirement: at least two competing orientation invariants with independently fixed ratio, or a third derived family tensor
verdict.free_ratio_warning: choosing the ratio from PMNS is a fit, not a prediction

claim_boundary: The CP-even statement assumes a single trace overlap with nondegenerate spectra. The CP-odd statement uses the universal 3x3 Jarlskog bound. This does not exclude multi-invariant or third-tensor actions.
